description_long: This coupe car features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly white exterior accented by black trim and red highlights on the front bumper. The vehicle has a bold front grille, angular headlights, and a sculpted hood, giving it a sporty and aggressive appearance. The side profile reveals large black alloy wheels, flush door handles, and a continuous roofline that extends smoothly to the rear, suggesting a hardtop configuration. The rear view showcases wraparound taillights, dual exhaust pipes, and a subtle integrated spoiler, enhancing its dynamic look. The windows are tinted black, providing privacy and a high-contrast aesthetic against the white body. Overall, the car exudes a premium, urban-ready vibe suitable for city streets and upscale neighborhoods.
description: A modern white coupe car with black trim, red front accents, and tinted windows, featuring a sporty, streamlined silhouette and large black wheels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bold grille, angular headlights, and red accents on the lower bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the continuous roofline, large black wheels, and flush door handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displays wraparound taillights, dual exhaust pipes, and an integrated spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the smooth roofline and black wheel design.
